reviews.review_description: If you play it I don’t need to explain it’s bad🗑🗑

Ok I’m a little embarrassed to say I had fun playing this. The physics and graphics are not great. I also can’t consistently get the same swing twice (and I even swing and miss a bunch). 

So what’s fun?  It was actually kind of cool to play this as a driving range game and I played for about 30 minutes. The real pay off though is when you hit the guys. It is incredibly satisfying (I won’t spoil it).

i was so excited i love golf. no good at it so i thought this would help but nooooo very inacurate. stupid guys waving for no reason are irritating as hell.balls go where ever they want. not even worth the 1 star. sorry
